title: Build AI health assistant with routine tracking and chat

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication integration allowing users to securely log in and maintain their health data
acceptanceCriteria: Users can log in using Internet Identity
User session persists across page refreshes
Health data is tied to authenticated user identity

requirements.text: Create a daily health routine tracking system where users can log and manage their daily health activities (exercise, meals, water intake, sleep, medications)
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add new routine entries with timestamp
Users can view their routine history
Users can edit or delete existing entries

requirements.text: Build an AI chat interface for health guidance where users can ask health-related questions and receive text-based advice
acceptanceCriteria: Users can send text messages and receive AI responses
AI provides general health guidance based on user queries
Chat history is saved per user

requirements.text: Implement an emergency contacts management feature where users can store and display emergency contact information (name, relationship, phone number)
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add multiple emergency contacts
Users can view all saved emergency contacts
Users can edit or remove contacts
Emergency contacts are prominently displayed and easily accessible

requirements.text: Design a clean, health-focused user interface with a calming color palette (soft greens, whites, light blues) and clear typography that promotes wellness and accessibility
acceptanceCriteria: Interface uses a cohesive health-themed color scheme
Navigation is intuitive with clear section labels
Visual design promotes a sense of calm and trust

constraints: Do not implement voice recognition features
Do not implement email sending functionality
Do not implement real-time SMS or emergency alert systems
Do not implement GPS location services
Do not implement MRI or X-ray scanning capabilities
Do not integrate with external emergency service APIs
nonGoals: Integration with external health APIs or services

required: Health and wellness hero banner with calming medical theme (hero-health.dim_1200x600.png)
Medical assistance icon for chat feature (chat-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Emergency contact icon in red cross style (emergency-icon.dim_128x128.png)
